concerns.text: FR-004 mandates calculating covariate shift using 'Wasserstein distance on RAW feature vectors'. The tasks (T022, T023) and plan implement 'PCA-based shift' and 'Mean Shift' instead. No task exists to implement the required Wasserstein distance calculation, leaving this functional requirement unimplemented.

FR-005 mandates fitting a 'simple linear regression model'. Task T029 implements 'Weighted Least Squares (WLS) regression'. No task exists to implement the specific simple linear regression required by the spec, creating a gap in requirement coverage.

FR-006 mandates 'block-permutation change-point detection' with fixed block size 2 and 10,000 permutations. Task T031 implements 'BIC-based change-point detection' with automatic block size selection. No task covers the specific block-permutation algorithm required by the spec.

FR-001 requires downloading 'UCI Adult' and 'Credit Card Default' datasets. The plan pivots to 'IPUMS CPS' or 'Synthetic' data. Task T013 mentions 'UCI Adult/Credit Card or IPUMS', but no specific task exists to handle the acquisition of the two mandatory datasets if they were available, or to formally document the scope reduction in the tasks.

Task T030 covers Spearman correlation (FR-009) but does not explicitly include the robustness verification across ECE binning strategies (5, 10, 20 bins) required by FR-010 and SC-002. While T032 mentions robustness, T030 should explicitly reference the binning verification to ensure full coverage of the correlation requirement.
